---
name: Epic
about: Parent epic grouping related stories
title: "EPIC-XXX: "
labels: "type: epic"
---

## Problem
<!-- What user/system capability is missing or broken at a high level? -->

## Desired Outcome
<!-- What does "done" look like for this epic? One paragraph. -->

## Current Evidence
<!-- File:line references or observed behavior. No guessing. -->

## Scope
<!-- What is IN scope. Be explicit. -->

## Out of Scope
<!-- What is NOT in scope. Prevents scope creep. -->

## Stories
<!-- List child stories as checkboxes. Fill in as issues are created. -->
- [ ] #

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What must be true for this epic to be complete? -->
- [ ]

## Risk
<!-- P0 / P1 / P2 / P3 -->

## Install Impact
<!-- none / install / update / uninstall / packaging / docs-only -->

## Visible Behavior Changed
<!-- yes / no -->

## Notes
